rights_request_page.heading: Exercise your GDPR rights
rights_request_page.description: In accordance with the GDPR, you can exercise your rights over your personal data.
rights_request_page.success_message: Your request has been submitted. We will process it as soon as possible.
rights_request_page.type_access_description: Obtain a copy of all personal data held about you.
rights_request_page.type_erasure_description: Request the deletion of your personal data.
rights_request_page.type_portability_description: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
rights_request_page.type_opposition_description: Object to the processing of your personal data.
rights_request_page.type_limitation_description: Request the restriction of processing of your data.

cookie_banner.title: We respect your privacy
cookie_banner.description: This site uses cookies and trackers to function properly and improve your experience. You can accept all cookies and trackers or only accept those that are strictly necessary.

consent_page.heading: Consent preferences
consent_page.description: Manage your cookies and trackers and data processing preferences.
consent_page.consent_necessary_description: Cookies and trackers essential for the website to function (authentication, security). These cannot be disabled.
consent_page.consent_functional_description: Cookies and trackers that remember your preferences (theme, language, display).
consent_page.consent_analytics_description: Cookies and trackers that help us understand how you use the site so we can improve it.
consent_page.consent_marketing_description: Cookies and trackers used to display relevant advertisements. None at this time.

my_data_page.heading: My personal data
my_data_page.description: View the data we store about you. You can export it or exercise your GDPR rights.
my_data_page.manage_preferences_description: Configure your cookies and trackers and consent preferences. You can enable or disable each category of cookies and trackers at any time.
my_data_page.exercise_rights_description: You have the right to access your data, rectify it, delete it, object to its processing, or request its portability.

legal_page.not_available: This page is not yet available.

accept_legal_page.update_description: Legal documents have been updated. Please read and accept them to continue.
accept_legal_page.scroll_hint: Scroll to the bottom of the document to be able to accept it.
accept_legal_page.registration_description: Please accept the following documents to access the service.
accept_legal_page.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
accept_legal_page.confirm_delete_message:
Your account will be deactivated for 30 days. If you log back in during this period, it will be automatically reactivated. After this period, all your data will be permanently deleted.

Are you sure you want to continue?

admin_rgpd_page.heading: GDPR & Compliance
admin_rgpd_page.description: GDPR compliance management: processing register, rights requests, audit, legal pages.

admin_legal_pages_tab.heading: Legal pages
admin_legal_pages_tab.warning_acceptance_invalidation: Warning: modifying this document will invalidate all existing acceptances. All users will need to re-accept it.
admin_legal_pages_tab.acceptance_hint: If enabled, users will need to accept this document to access the site.
